hero.subtitle: One command translates your locale files. Every translation method — Google Translate, LLMs, custom APIs, coached pipelines — is a config option. Use what works for each language.

features.title: One Command
features.description: Auto-detect your locale files, format, and target languages. Translate what changed. Skip what didn't.

features.title: Per-Pair Methods
features.description: Google Translate for French, an LLM for Japanese, a coached plugin for Plains Cree — all in the same config.

features.title: Registers & Coaching
features.description: Steer the LLM with per-language tone instructions. Formal Sie-form for German, Taglish code-switching for Filipino, warrior's honor for Klingon.

features.title: Content Aware
features.description: Code blocks, shortcodes, interpolation variables, and raw HTML are shielded during translation. The LLM never sees your code.

features.title: Zero Dependencies
features.description: Node.js built-ins only. No SDKs, no native modules, no build step. Works anywhere Node 20+ runs.

features.title: Quality Gate
features.description: Every translation is validated before writing. Wrong-script output, source echoes, length inflation, and placeholder corruption are caught and rejected.

use_cases.title: SaaS Internationalization
use_cases.description: Translate your Next.js, Hugo, or React app to 30+ languages with per-pair quality control.

use_cases.title: Build a Custom Pipeline
use_cases.description: Chain LLMs with FST validators, dictionaries, and post-processors. Package it as a plugin.

use_cases.title: Language Preservation
use_cases.description: Coached LLM translation for languages with no API coverage — Indigenous, endangered, constructed.

comparison.title: Not another TMS platform
comparison.description: Crowdin, Phrase, and Locize are cloud platforms that require accounts, dashboards, and monthly fees. Rosetta is a CLI tool that runs in your project — no accounts, no dashboards, no vendor lock-in.

arena.title_line1: Think you have the best method
arena.description: 7,000+ languages. ~130 have machine translation. The rest are an unsolved problem — and an open invitation. rosetta's evaluation harness benchmarks any method with fingerprinted, reproducible scoring. The leaderboard tracks every submission.
arena.callout_line1: This is an unsolved problem that everyone in the world can contribute to.
arena.callout_line2: Build a method. Score it. Give it back.

cards.title: Plug and Test
cards.description: Run your method against standardized benchmarks. chrF++, exact match, FST acceptance — all computed by the same harness.

cards.title: Claim Your Score
cards.description: Every submission is fingerprinted to a Git commit and scored against the same dataset. Open a PR to submit.

cards.title: Respect the Data
cards.description: Indigenous languages belong to their communities. rosetta supports OCAP, CARE, and Māori Data Sovereignty principles.

leaderboard_widget.title: 🏆 Method Leaderboard
leaderboard_widget.subtitle: Top translation methods ranked by chrF++ score.

seo.description: An i18n framework where every translation method is a config option. Google Translate, LLMs, custom pipelines — one command, per-pair control, quality-gated.
